arts.ttl: Juventus Secure Future Deal for Hancko: Details and Backstory
arts.sum: Juventus' sporting director Cristiano Giuntoli has reportedly secured a future deal for Feyenoord defender David Hancko, with the transfer set to be completed in the summer of 2025. Despite failing to bring the Slovakian international to Turin during the January transfer window, Juventus have maintained its interest and laid the groundwork for a summer move.
